# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 174.683 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.5164
  biquad b0=1.00056349868 b1=-1.99713760147 b2=0.996704635157 a1=-1.99713760147 a2=0.997268133837
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 252.319 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.6596
  biquad b0=1.00171968769 b1=-1.99139130116 b2=0.989943191431 a1=-1.99139130116 a2=0.99166287912
Filter 3: ON PK Fc 77.270 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.2871
  biquad b0=1.00068082341 b1=-1.996673804 b2=0.996018515045 a1=-1.996673804 a2=0.99669933845
Filter 4: ON PK Fc 1183.594 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.3925
  biquad b0=1.00942519853 b1=-1.94844527607 b2=0.944881028124 a1=-1.94844527607 a2=0.954306226654

  biquad b0=1.00051098994 b1=-1.99713690451 b2=0.997011708532 a1=-1.99713690451 a2=0.997522698476

  biquad b0=1.00469421429 b1=-1.96287860165 b2=0.972548030172 a1=-1.96287860165 a2=0.977242244466
